query:
INSERT INTO pending_symbolications (
                id, device_id, thread_id, payload_path, diagnostics_json,
                installation_info_json, binary_uuids_json, payload_index,
                received_at_ms, leased_at_ms, completed_at_ms, failed_at_ms,
                attempts, last_error
            )
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
